headline: Constellation Energy (CEG) Is Down 6.9% After Utility Selloff and AI Power Deals Spotlight - What's Changed
summary: In recent days, Constellation Energy has come under pressure after new inflation data showed a monthly drop in electricity prices and rising long-term bond yields, which weighed on the broader utility sector. At the same time, long-term clean power deals with major technology firms and ongoing nuclear investments highlight how AI-driven data center demand is reshaping Constellation’s role in the US energy mix. We’ll now examine how sector-wide pressure from falling reported electricity...

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Slip As Sticky Inflation And Yields Bite
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Thursday, Mar, 12 2026 US stock futures are pointing slightly lower this morning, as investors weigh steady but still warm inflation against rising borrowing costs and higher energy prices. The US CPI for February showed headline inflation at 2.4% and core at 2.5%, meaning the cost of living is not easing quickly enough to give the Federal Reserve clear room to cut rates. The 10 year Treasury yield sits around 4.24%, which keeps mortgages and...
